meaning: adj.不通气的,密不透气的vt.使不透气,密封
examples: Soft airproof main valve can obtain high airproof in the scope of over 95% lift pressure.
With strengthened steelwork and tighten jointing in each part, the cab has superior airproof and security performance.
The inside of engine room is sticked sponge, each two jointing side are airproofed by airproof glue, enhancing the capacity of heat preservation of the engine room.
